growth_records.strain: Chemostat enrichment (inocula: Harnaschpolder and Dokhaven WWTP activated sludge)
growth_records.medium: Mineral medium with acetate + N2O (Period IV, N2O-limited, low D)
growth_records.cite: Conthe et al. Life on N2O: deciphering the ecophysiology of N2O respiring bacterial communities in a continuous culture. The ISME Journal (2018). DOI:10.1038/s41396-018-0063-7. [PMC5864245]
growth_records.snippet: Period IV | N2O | D=0.027 | CH3COO- -1.78 | N2O -5.09 | N2 3.88 | NH4+ -0.30 | biomass 1.14 | CO2 2.15 (Table 2). YXAc 0.32, YXN2O 0.22 (Table 3).
growth_records.notes: mu=D=0.027; td=ln2/0.027=25.67 h. biomass(Cmol)=1.14/0.027=0.04222 Cmol; gDW=*24.6=1.039 g. Specific rate=Table2 mmol/h /1.039 gDW. N2O-limited. Mixed community. C-bal 93%, e- bal 97%.
